Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a user account

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is unable to change user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} created user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} changed user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete user account {object.account.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
